features: CITRUS FRESH SCENT: Bright neroli and sweet orange bring a fresh, uplifting feel to every bath. It is a lovely pick for winding down after work or adding a little calm to a slow weekend soak.
SOOTHING BATH SOAK: These Elysium Spa Bath Salts turn warm water into a comforting escape. Perfect for evening baths, quiet self care moments, or whenever the day has felt long and a little too busy.

PERFECT POST WORKOUT RECOVERY: After an intense session at the gym or a challenging run, a muscle soak with these Epsom salts will help reduce soreness and fatigue. The natural salts penetrate deep into the muscles, providing relief and helping you bounce back faster.
100% NATURAL EPSOM SALTS: Made with 100% Natural Epsom Salts, this calming bath soak keeps things simple and effective. It is ideal for those who enjoy classic bath salts with a clean, easy routine.

RESEALABLE BAG: The handy resealable bag helps keep the bath salts fresh between uses and makes storage simple. It is ideal for keeping by the bath, in a bathroom cupboard, or packed for a relaxing stay away.

NEROLI AND SWEET ORANGE BLEND: The citrus fresh fragrance feels light, sunny, and relaxing without being heavy. It suits morning refreshes, post-gym baths, or a peaceful soak before settling in for the night.

RELAXING SELF CARE MOMENT: A warm bath with these bath salts helps create a calm little ritual at home. Great for quiet evenings, reading in the bath, or enjoying a well-earned pause after a hectic day.

SOFTENS SKIN GENTLY: Leave skin feeling softer after a long soak while enjoying a calming bath experience. A lovely choice before bed, after chilly days out, or anytime skin feels like it needs a little comfort.

EASY TO USE IN THE BATH: Simply add to warm running bath water and let the salts dissolve as the room fills with citrus fresh scent. It makes everyday baths feel more special with very little effort at all.
CALMING EVERYDAY ESCAPE: These bath salts are an easy way to bring a spa-like feel into the home. They work beautifully for relaxing solo baths, Sunday resets, or a peaceful end to a busy family day.
description: Product Description Bring a little brightness to bath time with Elysium Spa Citrus Fresh Bath Salts. Made with 100% Natural Epsom Salts and scented with neroli and sweet orange, this soothing and relaxing soak is a simple way to turn an everyday bath into a more calming moment. The fresh citrus fragrance feels clean, cheerful, and comforting, creating a lovely atmosphere for switching off after a busy day. Whether the plan is a quiet soak before bed, a peaceful reset after work, or a slow weekend bath with a good book, these Elysium Spa Bath Salts help make that moment feel extra special. The blend is designed for those who enjoy classic Bath Salts with a fresh twist. The citrus fresh scent gives the bath a light and uplifting feel, while the warm water and soak encourage time to relax and slow down. Add them to warm running water, allow them to dissolve, and soak for at least 20 minutes for the full experience. It is an easy self care step that feels indulgent without being complicated. These calming Bath Salts are ideal for building a more relaxing Bath routine at home. The 100% Natural formula keeps the focus on a simple, effective soak, while the neroli and sweet orange fragrance adds a lovely spa like touch. Perfect for evening wind downs, post work baths, lazy Sunday resets, or any time a little calm is needed, Elysium Spa Citrus Fresh Bath Salts offer a fresh, soothing way to Relax. For anyone looking for a comforting Bath soak with a bright scent and a calming feel, this is an easy choice for everyday unwinding. Ingredients Magnesium Sulphate, Parfum, Limonene Directions Add to warm running bath water for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath, soak for at least 20 minutes to give the Epsom salts a chance to soften the skin and to be absorbed. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
